insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a streak and improving your scores. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can develop a growth mindset and create a sense of momentum that will help you overcome initial challenges and stay motivated to reach your full potential.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
